# multiline-text

Multi-line text field type for config_v2. Stores a plain string, rendered
as a resizable `<textarea>`. Supports an optional `rows` parameter to
control the initial height (defaults to 4).

## Usage

```ts
import { multilineTextField } from "@plugins/config_v2/plugins/fields/plugins/multiline-text/core";

const myConfig = defineConfig("my-plugin", {
  fields: {
    notes: multilineTextField({ label: "Notes", rows: 6 }),
  },
});
```
